basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Senior Training and Placement Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram) Senior Training and Placement Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website of IIITDM Kancheepuram. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIITDM Kancheepuram Senior Training and Placement Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Engineering or a Post graduate in any discipline from a reputed Institution / university, Minimum 15 years of overall work experience, of which 10 years of proven experience in placement in an Institute of National Importance / reputed higher educational institution or HR in manufacturing or IT industry, MBA-HR from reputed Institution (desirable)
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech in Engineering or a Post graduate in any discipline from a reputed Institution / university. Minimum 15 years of overall work experience, of which 10 years of proven experience in placement in an Institute of National Importance / reputed higher educational institution or HR in manufacturing or IT industry. MBA-HR from a reputed Institution is desirable.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIITDM Kancheepuram Senior Training and Placement Officer Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITDM Kancheepuram Senior Training and Placement Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 24th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Senior Training and Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech in Engineering or a Post Graduate degree in any discipline with a minimum of 15 years of overall work experience, including 10 years in placement or HR roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Training and Placement Officer position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Training and Placement Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 110,000 to Rs. 140,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIITDM Kancheepuram Senior Training and Placement Officer position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Training and Placement Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a Personal Discussion.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Training and Placement Officer position is Contract.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram).

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIITDM Kancheepuram located?
faq.answer: IIITDM Kancheepuram is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600127.
